svg.title: Evidence scoring and verdict aggregation pipeline
svg.desc: Diagram showing how each evidence piece gets scored through relevance, credibility, temporal, and diversity weights, then aggregated into a final verdict with confidence.

g.text: If agg_sup > 0.30 AND agg_ref > 0.30 → flag "Mixed evidence"
Confidence = max value after count adjustment
NEUTRAL or conf < 0.55 → trigger LLM verifier
